title: Satellite Config Fields
description: Schema describing an array of custom config field definitions for a satellite device. These fields are rendered in the Companion UI surface settings panel and the stored values are pushed back to the device via DEVICE-CONFIG.

id.description: Unique identifier for the field. Used as the key in the DEVICE-CONFIG JSON object.

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the UI.

description.description: Optional longer description shown in the UI to explain the field.

tooltip.description: Optional tooltip text shown on hover.

isVisibleExpression.description: Optional expression that controls field visibility. When provided, the field is only shown when the expression evaluates to true.

id.description: Unique identifier for the field. Used as the key in the DEVICE-CONFIG JSON object.

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the UI.

description.description: Optional longer description shown in the UI to explain the field.

tooltip.description: Optional tooltip text shown on hover.

isVisibleExpression.description: Optional expression that controls field visibility. When provided, the field is only shown when the expression evaluates to true.

regex.description: Optional regex pattern the value must match.

multiline.description: Whether the input is a multiline text area.

id.description: Unique identifier for the field. Used as the key in the DEVICE-CONFIG JSON object.

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the UI.

description.description: Optional longer description shown in the UI to explain the field.

tooltip.description: Optional tooltip text shown on hover.

isVisibleExpression.description: Optional expression that controls field visibility. When provided, the field is only shown when the expression evaluates to true.

allowCustom.description: Whether the user can type a custom value not in the choices list.

id.description: The value stored when this choice is selected.
